titleStmt.title: SII 28.7: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 7. (A.R. No. 7 of 1913.) ARUMBĀVŪR, PERAMBALUR TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Records the confirmation of the tenure as irai-ili (tax-free) enjoyed till then in respect of the total of 1,600 kuḻi measured by Magadēśan-kōl of naṉ-chey lands under chiṟṟēri, etc. being enjoyed as the dēvādāṉa of Vaḍa-Kayilāyam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār in Arumbār, besides the puṉ-chey under peri-ēri in the enjoyment of Viṉāyaka-ppiḷḷaiyār, the land enjoyed as maḍappuṟam by Deṇḍapāṇi-dēvar and the lands of Tirukkāḷatti-uḍaiyār by Araiśaṉ Toṇḍaimāṉ Perumāḷ-ppiḷḷai alias Chēdirāya-dēvaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ Irācarāca tevaṟku Iyāṇṭu 2 10 3 vatu vaikāci mātattu Oru nāḷ Araicaṉ toṇṭaimān perumāḷp piḷḷaiyāna cetirāya tevanen Arumpāriṟaiyili Uṭaiyār vaṭakayilāyamuṭaiyanāyanār tevatāṉam ciṟṟeri naṉceyāṉa nilamum periye
ri naṉce kuḻi 1000 6 100m viṉāyakappiḷḷaiyār naṉce kuḻi 5 10m teṇṭapāṇi tevar maṭappuṟaṅkuḻi 4 100m karaippuṉce kuḻi 6 100 3 10m maṭappuṟaṅkuḻi 78 10m puṉ cekuḻi 8000m tirukkāḷatti Uṭaiyār naṉcekuḻi 2 100m teṇṭapāṇi tevar maṭappuṟaṅ ku
ḻi 2 1000 8 100 5 10m kāṅkarai kuḻi [7 100]m Iṟṟai vakaimuṉ pilāṇṭukaḷ Oḻukiṉapaṭi Iṟaiyiliyāy ponta naṉce puṉce makatecaṉ kolāl kuḻi 10000 5 1000 10m ciṟṟeri naṉce nilamum Ippaṭi Oḻukiṉapaṭikkuk kalveṭṭik kuṭutteṉ Araicaṉ toṇṭai
māṉ perumāḷppiḷḷaiyāṉa cetirāya tevanen Itu cimākecurar Irakkai .
Digital edition of SII 28.7 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
